# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: default-authorization-policy
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: linkerd-policy
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-framework
    linkerd.io/control-plane-component: policy
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Default authorization policy for namespace-level service-to-service communication"
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: ""
  proxyProtocol: unknown
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-allow-all-authenticated
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: linkerd-policy
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-framework
    linkerd.io/control-plane-component: policy
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Default policy allowing all authenticated meshed traffic when no explicit rules exist"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: default-authorization-policy
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: all-meshed-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: all-meshed-identity
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: linkerd-policy
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-framework
    linkerd.io/control-plane-component: policy
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Accepts any identity within the mesh trust domain for default service-to-service communication"
spec:
  identities:
    - "*.linkerd-policy.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
    - "*.default.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-unauthenticated
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: linkerd-policy
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-framework
    linkerd.io/control-plane-component: policy
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Denies unauthenticated traffic by default for services without explicit authorization rules"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Namespace
    name: linkerd-policy
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: all-meshed-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: allow-cluster-internal
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: linkerd-policy
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-framework
    linkerd.io/control-plane-component: policy
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Allows cluster-internal network traffic for health checks and probes"
spec:
  networks:
    - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
    - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
    - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-probes-and-healthchecks
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: linkerd-policy
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-framework
    linkerd.io/control-plane-component: policy
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Allows kubelet probes and health checks from cluster-internal networks"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Namespace
    name: linkerd-policy
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: allow-cluster-internal
      kind: NetworkAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
